hero.subtitle: Connect with a JWT access token, edit the JSON payload, and inspect messages sent and received on this server's Socket.IO gateway.

session.title: Session
session.tokenPlaceholder: Paste your Bearer access token (without the Bearer prefix)

payload.title: Payload
payload.hint: Emitted as Socket.IO event message. The type field routes to the registered handler.
payload.invalidJson: Invalid JSON — fix the payload before sending.

note.title: Notes
items: The connection uses this site's origin and path /ws — the URL is not shown here.
The token is kept in memory only until you reload the page or click End session.
The example type requires Role.SUPER. See the WebSocket documentation for the full contract.
